nodes.label: Tech Stack: Next.js, Supabase, Vercel, Stripe Connect, Resend, JWT RS256
Prompt #1: Project Setup, Auth, Roles, Foundations
Prompt #2: Database Schema, RLS, Anti-Poaching Boundary
Prompt #7: Vendor Hybrid Pricing Tiers + Monthly Cron
Monthly Billing Cron (Supabase Edge Function, 1st of month 01:00 UTC)
Reseller Subscription Lapse Gate (pauses offers on lapse)
Stable anon_user_id per (buyer_id, app_id) across resubscriptions
Webhook Idempotency (process each Stripe event id exactly once)
App Approval Triggers Stripe Product+Price Creation
RLS Test Suite (cross-vendor denial, buyer isolation, role escalation)
Safe Logo Upload (magic bytes validation, Supabase Storage RLS)
Mutual Exclusion: affiliate_id XOR reseller_id on subscriptions
Reseller-sold Revenue Excluded from vendor_billing Gross
Money as Integer Cents + Basis Points (never floats)
DB Transaction Required for Multi-Table Writes

hyperedges.label: Invoice Paid Money Split: Vendor + Affiliate/Reseller Transfer Fan-Out
Anti-Poaching Boundary: Restricted Views for Vendor, Reseller, Affiliate
Subscription Attribution Exclusivity: Direct, Affiliate, or Reseller (never two)
